playbooks.name: Data Breach Response
steps: Preserve all logs and forensic evidence
Assess scope: identify all affected data and records
Engage legal counsel for breach notification requirements
Determine root cause of unauthorized access
Patch vulnerability or close attack vector
Implement additional monitoring on affected systems
Prepare breach notification for affected individuals

playbooks.name: DDoS Attack Response
steps: Enable rate limiting on edge devices
Identify attack vectors and source IPs
Coordinate with ISP for upstream filtering

playbooks.name: Phishing Incident Response
steps: Identify all recipients who received the email
Check for users who clicked or submitted credentials
Force password reset for compromised accounts
Block sender domain and malicious URLs
Send awareness notification to all staff
